rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Undertaking By Plaintiff And For Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; And Declarations Of Rachel Serrano And Brian Mccauley In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday June 14, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT RACHEL SERRANO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or, In The Alternative, For Posting Of Undertaking By Plaintiff And For Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; And Declarations Of Rachel Serrano And Brian Mccauley In Support GRANTED. No opposition filed. Fees and costs granted in the amount of $2,560. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Rachel Serranos Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Rachel Dunays Unlimited Civil Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday June 14, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT RACHEL SERRANO Defendant Rachel Serranos Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Rachel Dunays Unlimited Civil Complaint Hearing Required to address whether February 17, 2016 filing is a pleading within the meaning of CCP 435(a)(2) or an ex-parte application. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLAS GONZALEZ VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday June 14, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to July 8, 2016. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies to department 501 no later than June 17, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party failed to provide a copy of the operative complaint opposing party failed to provide a copy of opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GAUCHO PARTNERS, LP VS. ALEXANDRA RUPP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday June 14, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT ALEXANDRA RUPP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. = (501/REQ)
